message:
feat: implement dependency resolution algorithm for devcontainer features

Add round-based dependency resolution algorithm that handles both hard dependencies
(dependsOn) and soft dependencies (installsAfter). Algorithm processes features in
rounds, installing all features whose dependencies are satisfied in each iteration.

- Add DependsOn and InstallsAfter fields to FeatureMetadata and ResolvedFeature
- Implement ResolveFeatures method with round-based resolution
- Detect circular dependencies
- Handle soft dependencies (installsAfter) only when referenced feature exists
- Add comprehensive test case validating correct ordering: B -> A -> C

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
